title: Backpack appoints Mark Wetjen as President of Backpack US to lead US expansion
message_html: Backpack appoints Mark Wetjen as President of Backpack US to lead US expansion ...
snippet: Wu Blockchain (@WuBlockchain): Backpack announced the appointment of Mark Wetjen as President of Backpack US, where he will lead the company’s expansion in the United States. Wetjen previously served as a commissioner and acting chairman of the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC), and later
